title: ceratochilus orchideus
intro: Ceratochilus orchideus, also known as the Indian snake root, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ceratochilus orchideus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Ceratochilus orchideus is often used in the form of decoctions, powders, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
